text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... What should I do?
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was trying to come up with something that'll
help me win the Cutie Derby. Something that will
blow up my socials! Do you have any ideas?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was trying to come up with something that'll
help me win the Cutie Derby. Something that will
blow up my socials! Do you have any ideas?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what I understand, the Cutie Derby is an
engagement contest between short-distance
racing influencers. A project of some sort could
definitely help bring eyes to Curren.
choice_data_list:
How about a riddle, with different hints for each
platform you're on?

How about a riddle, with different hints for each
platform you're on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A riddle would be interactive and get people
thinking about Curren. And if hints are scattered
across her accounts, that'd get people from one
platform viewing the others.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, solving a riddle sounds super fun! And
interactive events tend to get a lot of likes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now I've gotta think of a good question. It has to
be juuust challenging enough to be fun. There's
also something I want to try...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, you're free tomorrow, right? Let's go
record some clips! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, here we are recording the riddle.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's the intro covered. Let's take a little
break!
choice_data_list:
A break? But it's barely been ten minutes since
we started...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I need to grab a drink to keep my voice fresh,
though! Be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check over the footage we got while I wait, but
Curren doesn't come back, even after fifteen
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep. ♪
choice_data_list: ...A message from Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Sorry for not sticking around. I got distracted
following something all sparkly starry and glittery
*winkwink* I guess that tracks for me though lol.
Come follow too if you want."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Sorry for not sticking around. I got distracted
following something all sparkly starry and glittery
*winkwink* I guess that tracks for me though lol.
Come follow too if you want."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The way she's writing is a bit unnatural, and she didn't say where she actually is, so... I'm guessing this is a riddle too. She did kinda hint at it yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now I've gotta think of a good question. It has to
be juuust challenging enough to be fun. There's
also something I want to try...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll test out the difficulty on big bro! ♪ Hehe, I
wonder if he'll be able to solve the clues.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll test out the difficulty on big sis! ♪ Hehe, I
wonder if she'll be able to solve the clues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can just see her sweet little smirk in my mind. If
this is a practice run, then the hints will be on her
socials. Might as well start with Umastagram...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a new pic of her striking a cutesy pose in
her dorm room. The caption says, "just chillin
watchin my fav series, but about to get changed
& #BackOnTrack ♡".

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's gotta be a hint here. Her message said she
was "following something all sparkly starry and
glittery *winkwink*"...
choice_data_list:
I'm not really seeing anything "sparkly" or
"starry" in the pic, though...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I could sneak keywords into the captions?
Y'know, to lead people to the next clue with
wordplay. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's got to be a reason she wrote all those
synonyms out... What's sparkly and starry? Wink
wink? Her "fav series"?
choice_data_list: Wait. Wait, it's gotta be the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start scrolling through her Twinkle Series posts,
and I find one where she's striking the same pose
from the same angle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is from when we went out to the racecourse
together. It's tagged with just "#BeautifulDay
#AtTheRaces."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new post from Curren. It's captioned "Trying
the #chapstick El uses but like, is it still
chap'stick' if it's a gel not stick? #Beauty Anyways
I really gotta get changed #BackOnTrack"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look through her Twinkle Series pics again, and
lo and behold, there's a pic of her at a track in
the same pose as the new post, captioned
"#DreamBig"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Gotta get changed... back on "track." #Beauty
#DreamBig... You know what the hints mean,
right, big bro?
choice_data_list: I've got it! I know where she is!
I've got it! I know where she is!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Gotta get changed... back on "track." #Beauty
#DreamBig... You know what the hints mean,
right, big sis?
choice_data_list: I've got it! I know where she is!
I've got it! I know where she is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren led me to posts with "Beauty" and "Dream"
in the tags, and mentioned getting changed...
into her Beauty Dream Cup racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then "the chapstick El uses" that's a gel "not
stick"... Her initial dm about "not sticking
around"... If I take "stick" out of "chapstick El,"
that leaves—
choice_data_list: The Beauty Dream Cup chapel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurry over, my feet moving faster with each
step. Next thing I know—I'm running.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I was wondering when you'd get here, big
bro. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I was wondering when you'd get here, big
sis. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Buuut don't get your hopes up yet! I've still got
one more riddle for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I put my whole heart into proposing to this
racewear, remember?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooo... Now it's your turn. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Curren came to this chapel before, she had
to declare her feelings toward the racewear. I
guess she wants me to do the same.
choice_data_list:
Curren... I realized something while I was solving
your riddles.

Curren... I realized something while I was solving
your riddles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking through her old photos, I saw just how
much she's grown—brighter and brighter. Cuter
and cuter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's proof of all the work she's put in. Her cuteness
has brought joy to countless people, and that joy
has circled back to Curren herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I tell her—that she carries herself with
queenly composure and grace befitting the dress.
She earned it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... and what do you think of me ? ...What am I to you?
choice_data_list: The cutest in the whole wide universe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... and what do you think of me ? ...What am I to you?
choice_data_list: The cutest in the whole wide universe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, perfect answer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for that lovely confession, big bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for that lovely confession, big sis!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm really, really happy that you solved all
the riddles to come find me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then let me make a single vow—I promise that I'll
make this racewear's cuteness shine by being the
cutest me I can possibly be.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: After all, we've got a long series ahead of us!
choice_data_list: Yeah!
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: After all, we've got a long series ahead of us!
choice_data_list: Yeah!
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Curren posts similar riddles for her social
media project, generating a ton of engagement
surrounding her old races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Curren came to this chapel before, she had
to declare her feelings toward the racewear. I
guess she wants me to do the same.
choice_data_list: The riddles helped me reflect on your journey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that scrolling through the Twinkle Series
photos reminded me how hard she's been
working.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's put a lot of effort into racing and social
media—all to become cuter.
choice_data_list: I'm really impressed by your work ethic!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: My... work ethic? That's it?
choice_data_list: Huh? Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess I've still got a ways to go...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just you wait! I'll become super, ultra, extra cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be so cute, you won't be able to think of
anything else!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be so cute, you won't be able to think of
anything else!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So you'd better watch out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me a determined smile with her renewed
vow... And I'm eager to see how she'll grow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Curren posts similar riddles for her social
media project, generating a ton of engagement
surrounding her old races!
